reviews.review_description: You can't watch anything after downloading. You have to pay 39 dollars to watch it. There is also a charge of 14 dollars for the trial. Why don't you grab money? I don't watch the free YouTube. I came here to pay for it. Do you think I'm a fool? If I had known that I had to pay to watch it, I would not have downloaded it.
I had a great time watching UNIS through Nexst’s Xmersive app. It was worth the preorder! The visuals are unmatched! I can’t wait until they fix the PhotoEX app for the exclusive pcs!

reviews.review_title: Your own personal kpop vr concert.
reviews.review_description:
Part 1: addressing the one star reviews: Disregard the reviews giving this app a one star because they found out you have to pay for the songs. Imagine getting mad at steam cause you had to buy the games? xmersive and nexst had been marketing this for more than a year and they have always stated you will have to buy the contents. The App itself is nothing more than a place to buy and watch kpop songs/concerts in VR. This is not a platform for free videos and user submitted contents, it is (as of now) geared towards kpop enthusiasts and fans who want to see or watch their idols in VR. Money Grab? Sure but it isn’t forcing you to. Same way how some kpop fans spend money for photo cards.

Part 2: The actual app: this app is unlike the other vr media players in that you can’t pause/stop/rewind/ff. You can choose whether you want to play a whole concert or just one song at a time. As soon as it starts playing your controls become nothing more but light sticks waving it around while you seat thru (or dance to the choreo with your light sticks!!!) the concert/song just like you would in a live concert.

The bad: you have to download each song and for the current available album it was around 18gb. As for the quality, it is 4k but somehow the fps/refresh rate seems kind of off specially when they start moving a lot.  On the good side, more Unis material and behind the scenes!!

Overall for $40 that is $10 per song, it is only worth if you are a real fan. This would be better if it is in higher resolution  and fps/refresh rate.
